title: Can you give Lady the loving home she deserves?
description: GEORGE NEWS - Meet Lady – a gentle...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Meet Lady – a gentle soul with a big heart who is patiently waiting for her forever home at the Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA).


> Lady was surrendered from the Uniondale area after her previous owner could no longer care for her.


Since then, this small, well-mannered girl has quietly captured the hearts of everyone who meets her.

She gets along beautifully with her fellow shelter friends and loves nothing more than curling up on a warm lap.

With her calm, affectionate nature, Lady would be the perfect companion for someone looking for a loyal and loving friend.

Lady has been waiting for quite some time. Could you be the one she’s been hoping for?


> If you’d like to meet her, visit the Garden Route SPCA in George or contact them on 044 878 1990.


Let’s help Lady find the happy ending she so deserves.

She's a small well-mannered girl.
